title: Talklines/Warmlines * LGBTQ2+ Individuals - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Talklines/Warmlines * LGBTQ2+ Individuals 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Older Adults LGBTQ2+ Individuals Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF DEQH HELPLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides culturally-specific peer support helpline for South Asian LGBTQ2+ individuals. Eligibility: Individuals who identify as LGBTQ2+ or questioning and part of the South Asian community, including Afghanistan, Bangladesh, Bhutan, Burma, India, the Maldives, Nepal, Pakistan, Sri Lanka, and Tibet Hours: Thursday/Sunday 5pm-7pm Email (908) 367-3374 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
